name: Rosie's Sour Cream and Buttermilk Cornbread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the cornmeal, baking soda, and salt in a large bowl.
2. Mix in the buttermilk and sour cream until just combined.
3. Grease a well-seasoned 9-inch pie plate or cake pan.
4. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
5. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 40 minutes, or until lightly browned.
6. Turn off the heat and let cool in the pan for a few minutes before serving.
Nutritional info per serving: 202 cal; 5g pro, 30g carb, 7g fat (31%), 1.8g fiber, 14mg chol, 292mg sod
